influencerRules.payout: verified-sale/net-profit gated; no guaranteed payment before Brian salary, overhead, ads, taxes/fees/refunds/chargebacks/platform/payment/shipping costs and approved expenses are covered
influencerRules.tone: Brian & Co eloquent, refined, localized, income-tier-aware, never gimmicky
influencerRules.affiliateLink: unique referral/affiliate link per influencer scaffold
influencerRules.productRequired: not always; may promote with or without receiving product depending on program terms
influencerRules.contentSubmission: required links/examples of work for review
